entries.trait_desc:500011: Born into a low-status, resource-scarce clan. Survived through hard labor. Logging, mining, planting, and gathering proficiency growth rate increased by 50%.
entries.trait_desc:500012: Clan declined and survived through hard labor. Logging, mining, planting, and gathering proficiency growth rate increased by 60%.
entries.trait_desc:500013: Accumulated extensive labor experience through survival. Logging, mining, planting, and gathering proficiency growth rate increased by 75%.
entries.trait_desc:500021: Many apprentices in the clan. Learned by observation from a young age. Weaving, pottery, masonry, leatherworking, and kiln proficiency growth rate increased by 50%.
entries.trait_desc:500022: Clan passed down many laborer skills and techniques. Weaving, pottery, masonry, leatherworking, and kiln proficiency growth rate increased by 60%.
entries.trait_desc:500023: Highly adaptable to miscellaneous work. Weaving, pottery, masonry, leatherworking, and kiln proficiency growth rate increased by 75%.
entries.trait_desc:500031: Born into an artisan clan. Learned by observation from a young age. Craftsman, alchemy, weaponsmithing, armorsmithing, and cooking proficiency growth rate increased by 50%.
entries.trait_desc:500032: Famous craftsmen among the clan provided excellent mentorship. Craftsman, alchemy, weaponsmithing, armorsmithing, and cooking proficiency growth rate increased by 60%.
entries.trait_desc:500033: Showed exceptional crafting talent since youth. Craftsman, alchemy, weaponsmithing, armorsmithing, and cooking proficiency growth rate increased by 75%.
entries.trait_desc:500041: Born into a warrior clan. Learned by observation from a young age. Sword, dual blade, hammer, greatsword, and gauntlet proficiency growth rate increased by 50%.
entries.trait_desc:500042: Many notable warriors in the clan, skilled in close combat. Sword, dual blade, hammer, greatsword, and gauntlet proficiency growth rate increased by 60%.
entries.trait_desc:500043: A legendary warrior's glory lives on in the clan. Sword, dual blade, hammer, greatsword, and gauntlet proficiency growth rate increased by 75%.
entries.trait_desc:500051: Born into a hunter clan. Learned by observation from a young age. Bow, spear, sword, dual blade, and gauntlet proficiency growth rate increased by 50%.
entries.trait_desc:500052: Many notable hunters in the clan, skilled at delivering killing blows. Bow, spear, sword, dual blade, and gauntlet proficiency growth rate increased by 60%.
entries.trait_desc:500053: Legendary hunters among the clan inspire a natural talent. Bow, spear, sword, dual blade, and gauntlet proficiency growth rate increased by 75%.
entries.trait_desc:500061: Grew up surrounded by clan guards. Learned by observation from a young age. Greatsword, sword, spear, shield, and bow proficiency growth rate increased by 50%.
entries.trait_desc:500062: Many night watchmen in the clan trained you during long nights. Greatsword, sword, spear, shield, and bow proficiency growth rate increased by 60%.
entries.trait_desc:500063: Served as temple guard for many terms, highly valued for martial prowess. Greatsword, sword, spear, shield, and bow proficiency growth rate increased by 75%.
entries.trait_desc:500071: Family had excellent survival skills. Grew up learning medicine, swimming, and climbing at a greatly increased rate.
entries.trait_desc:500072: Family had excellent survival skills. Grew up learning medicine, swimming, and climbing at a very greatly increased rate.
entries.trait_desc:500073: Family had excellent survival skills. Grew up learning medicine, swimming, and climbing at an extremely increased rate.
entries.trait_desc:510011: Clan produced many craftsmen but not laborers. Logging, mining, planting, and gathering proficiency growth rate reduced by 25%.
entries.trait_desc:510012: Few laborers among the clan. Logging, mining, planting, and gathering proficiency growth rate reduced by 35%.
entries.trait_desc:510013: Born into a wealthy clan and despised hard labor from youth. Logging, mining, planting, and gathering proficiency growth rate reduced by 50%.
entries.trait_desc:510021: Many laborers in the clan, but you're a nonconformist. Weaving, masonry, leatherworking, pottery, and kiln proficiency growth rate reduced by 25%.
entries.trait_desc:510022: Clan members were terrible laborers. Weaving, masonry, leatherworking, pottery, and kiln proficiency growth rate reduced by 35%.
entries.trait_desc:510023: Avoided repetitive menial work since youth. Weaving, masonry, leatherworking, pottery, and kiln proficiency growth rate reduced by 50%.
entries.trait_desc:510031: Completely lacks the artisan gene. Craftsman, alchemy, weaponsmithing, armorsmithing, and cooking proficiency growth rate reduced by 25%.
entries.trait_desc:510032: Clan believes in slow and steady work. Craftsman, alchemy, weaponsmithing, armorsmithing, and cooking proficiency growth rate reduced by 35%.
entries.trait_desc:510033: A rough individual, completely unsuited for fine craftwork. Craftsman, alchemy, weaponsmithing, armorsmithing, and cooking proficiency growth rate reduced by 50%.
entries.trait_desc:510041: Frequently oppressed by the tribe, focused solely on combat skills. Spear, bow, and shield proficiency growth rate reduced by 25%.
entries.trait_desc:510042: Overshadowed by powerful warriors, focused on combat at the expense of other skills. Spear, bow, and shield proficiency growth rate reduced by 35%.
entries.trait_desc:510043: Misguided by a strong warrior, obsessively focused on melee combat. Spear, bow, and shield proficiency growth rate reduced by 50%.
entries.trait_desc:510051: Showed some hunter talent in youth, leading to a lopsided growth path. Greatsword, shield, and hammer proficiency growth rate reduced by 25%.
entries.trait_desc:510052: Constantly scolded for poor hunting skills, obsessively trained as a hunter while neglecting other skills. Greatsword, shield, and hammer proficiency growth rate reduced by 35%.
entries.trait_desc:510053: A stubborn hunter, obsessively focused on hunting skills while neglecting others. Greatsword, shield, and hammer proficiency growth rate reduced by 50%.
entries.trait_desc:510061: Experienced a painful lesson in youth, focusing on guard skills while neglecting others. Dual blade, gauntlet, and hammer proficiency growth rate reduced by 25%.
entries.trait_desc:510062: Scolded for poor guard skills, focused on guard training at the expense of others. Dual blade, gauntlet, and hammer proficiency growth rate reduced by 35%.
entries.trait_desc:510063: A rigid individual, obsessed with guard skills while neglecting others. Dual blade, gauntlet, and hammer proficiency growth rate reduced by 50%.
entries.trait_desc:510071: Family had poor survival skills. Medicine, swimming, and climbing proficiency growth rate reduced by 25%.
entries.trait_desc:510072: Family had poor survival skills. Medicine, swimming, and climbing proficiency growth rate reduced by 35%.
entries.trait_desc:510073: Family had poor survival skills. Medicine, swimming, and climbing proficiency growth rate reduced by 50%.
entries.trait_desc:600011: Master of many weapons with deep expertise. All weapon damage +10%, attack speed +10%.
entries.trait_desc:600012: Nobody takes a beating better. When attacked with tenacity above 50%, cannot be critically hit.
entries.trait_desc:600013: Infamous tribal executioner. Damage to torso permanently increased by 12%.
entries.trait_desc:600014: One with the night. Move speed +10% and crit rate +5% when moving at night.
entries.trait_desc:600015: Ancestral throwing axe technique weakens prey. Hitting with a throwing axe increases target's damage taken by 10% for 10s.
entries.trait_desc:600016: Once killed a tribal leader with a throwing knife from several meters away. Hits apply bleed dealing 20% of own attack per second for 10s, stackable.
entries.trait_desc:600017: Disrupt breathing to panic prey. Hitting with a javelin reduces target's stamina recovery by 80% for 10s.
entries.trait_desc:600018: The moment the arrow leaves the bow, the prey's fate is sealed. 20% chance with bow attacks to treat any hit as a weak point hit and reduce target's move speed by 50% for 6s.
entries.trait_desc:600021: Skilled craftsman. Cooking and craftsman proficiency growth rate increased by 50%.
entries.trait_desc:600022: Skilled craftsman. Weaponsmithing, armorsmithing, and alchemy proficiency growth rate increased by 50%.
entries.trait_desc:600031: Animal slayer, damage to non-human creatures increased by 10%.
entries.trait_desc:600041: Attacking enemies below 30% HP or near death is thrilling. 25% chance to gain +20% attack, +20% move speed, +10% attack speed for 8s (30s cooldown).
entries.trait_desc:600051: Fragile mind, easily broken. Max focus reduced by 50%.
entries.trait_desc:600052: A lifetime of lockpicking. No matter how secure the chest, it can be opened quickly. Chest opening speed increased by 80%.
entries.trait_desc:600053: Lucky soul. One of those people who always find good things. Rare item drop chance increased by 20%.
entries.trait_desc:600054: Notoriously unlucky. Rare item drop chance reduced by 50%.
entries.trait_desc:600055: Tireless like a machine, to the point of concerning mental stability. Max focus increased by 100%.
entries.trait_desc:600056: Arrogant and never truly accepted others. Loyalty decay rate +200%. May flee with tribal assets and 1 low-loyalty tribesman when loyalty drops too low. Below 400 loyalty, true nature revealed: +15% backstab damage.
entries.trait_desc:600057: Considered an oddity by the tribe due to unusual skin. Immune to burn and ignite effects.
entries.trait_desc:600058: Oily body as if soaked in oil. Burn damage doubled while ignited.
entries.trait_desc:600059: Blood sustains the body. 40% of bleed damage dealt to targets within close range converts to HP recovery; effect increases to 80% while bleeding.
entries.trait_desc:600060: Sacrifice dodge ability in exchange for immunity to all stagger effects.
entries.trait_desc:600061: Meticulous worker. Weaving, pottery, and leatherworking proficiency growth rate increased by 50%.
entries.trait_desc:600062: Good with rough work. Masonry and kiln proficiency growth rate increased by 50%.
entries.trait_desc:600063: Grip enemies by the throat with invisible hands. When damaged by a target within close range, reduce their trait trigger chance by 5% for 12s, up to 5 stacks.
entries.trait_desc:600064: Master of powerful greatsword technique. When using greatsword charged heavy attack, releasing at the right moment unleashes a more powerful slash.
entries.trait_desc:600068: 15% chance on hit to inflict 'Cowardice' for 15s: target's single-hit damage cannot exceed 300. Damage cap is affected by the tribal standing of both parties (30s cooldown).
entries.trait_desc:600071: Destined for hard labor. Logging and mining proficiency growth rate increased by 50%.
entries.trait_desc:600072: Experienced farmer, personally planted crops grow 20% faster.
entries.trait_desc:600073: Village's best butcher. Animal butchering yield increased by 20%.
